arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund eye Bayern Munich talent Paul Wanner
arts.sum: With Borussia Dortmund preparing their transfer targets for 2025, the Westfalen outfit have identified Bayern Munich talent Paul Wanner for a potential transfer, according to BILD. The 18-year-old, currently on…
